title: PRD: Scheduled report exports
text:
# PRD — Scheduled report exports
Product area: Reporting & Export
Status: Not started
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request scheduled report exports. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Reporting & Export area.

## Proposed solution
Implement scheduled report exports with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Reporting & Export-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Backlog — not yet prioritized.
